description: Public Atom API for searching and fetching arXiv e-print metadata.

tools.name: query_papers
tools.description: Search arXiv papers or fetch specific arXiv IDs. Returns an Atom XML feed containing matching paper entries. Optional: search_query, id_list, start (default: 0) (plus 3 more).

params.name: search_query
params.description: Search expression such as all:electron, ti:'large language model', au:'smith', or cat:cs.AI.

params.name: id_list
params.description: Comma-delimited arXiv IDs to fetch, such as 1706.03762 or 1706.03762v7.

params.name: max_results
params.description: Maximum number of results to return. arXiv asks clients to make no more than one request every three seconds and avoid large requests.
